steps.title: Identify the collaboration signal
steps.content: The passage states that Bell worked closely with Woolf to create original cover art. The blank needs a word describing their type of working relationship.

steps.title: Match the collaboration
steps.content: Partnership directly captures the collaborative working relationship described in the passage. Rebellion and disagreement suggest conflict rather than collaboration, while discovery describes an outcome, not a relationship. That matches choice B — B is correct.
